title: US States
description: Click anywhere inside the correct state for full points!

rounds.clue: The largest US state by area, it spans four time zones and contains 17 of the 20 highest peaks in the country.
The only US state that is an archipelago, it was the 50th state admitted to the union in 1959.
Known as the Lone Star State, it is the largest contiguous US state by both area and population.
This Great Lakes state is shaped like a mitten and is home to more freshwater coastline than any other state.
The smallest US state by area, it was the first to declare independence from Britain in 1776.
